comment.body: It's been interesting watching the momentum measure indicator on the 30min today (7 period/1.5 SD).  We've had all green 30 min bars, yet measuring volatility and volume, it flipped red on the 11:30am bar (after the trend line went green to red on the preceding bar), and has held (so far) the red dot indicator through this slow grind even with changes on the 10.  Will continue to watch how this plays out.  I bought a 1DTE put that's treading water.
comment.raw_body: It's been interesting watching the momentum measure indicator on the 30min today (7 period/1.5 SD).  We've had all green 30 min bars, yet measuring volatility and volume, it flipped red on the 11:30am bar (after the trend line went green to red on the preceding bar), and has held (so far) the red dot indicator through this slow grind even with changes on the 10.  Will continue to watch how this plays out.  I bought a 1DTE put that's treading water.
